<!-- ---
title: "Global Climate Classification Change Analysis"
subtitle: "Recent Period vs Climate Standard Reference Period"
author: "Rick Forest"
description: "A Quarto book that downloads, transforms, explores, and classifies climate data to compare a Recent Period against a Climate Standard Reference Period."
--- -->

# Introduction {#sec-intro .unnumbered}

## Overview

This book presents a multi-stage pipeline for global climate classification change analysis::

1. **Download Data** – Collect ERA5 climate datasets.  
2. **Transform Data** – Preprocess and derive monthly/seasonal stats.  
3. **Explore Data** – Summarize, tabulate, and visualize trends.  
4. **Classify Climate** – Apply Köppen–Trewartha classification to compare CRP vs DCN.

Use the sidebar to navigate, or read in order using the chapter links below.

## Chapters

- [01 — Download Data](01-download-data.qmd)  
- [02 — Transform Data](02-transform-data.qmd)  
- [03 — Explore Data](03-explore-data.qmd)  
- [04 — Classify Climate](04-classify-climate.qmd)

## How to Render

Render the full book:
```bash
quarto render
```

## How to Preview

Live preview (auto-reload in your browser):
```bash
quarto preview
```
